sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الثَّعْلَبَةُ وَالأَرْنَبُ يَعِيشَانِ فِي نَفْسِ الْغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lisica i zec su živjeli u istoj šumi.
sentences.translationEn: The fox and the rabbit lived in the same forest.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْبِدَايَةِ كَانَ كُلٌّ مِنْهُمَا وَحِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Na početku je svako od njih bio sam.
sentences.translationEn: At first each of them was alone.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ مَرِضَ الأَرْنَبُ وَجَاءَتِ الثَّعْلَبَةُ بِطَعَامٍ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana se zec razbolio i lisica mu je donijela hranu.
sentences.translationEn: One day the rabbit got sick and the fox brought food for him.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَهَا الأَرْنَبُ وَمُنْذُ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمِ أَصْبَحَا أَصْدِقَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Zec joj se zahvalio i od tog dana su postali prijatelji.
sentences.translationEn: The rabbit thanked her and from that day they became friends.
